---
name: Feedback
about: Observations, workflow notes, data quality, or general questions
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
assignees: tg12
---

## What prompted this feedback

A specific event, workflow, data quality issue, or general observation about using the platform.

## The feedback

Be direct. What is working well, what is not, or what question you have.

## Which part of the platform does this relate to

<!-- tick any that apply, or leave blank -->
- [ ] Map interaction
- [ ] A specific data source
- [ ] Data accuracy or freshness
- [ ] Visual design / readability
- [ ] Workflow — how I actually use the platform
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Something I cannot categorise

## Severity or urgency

- [ ] Just an observation — no action needed
- [ ] Worth considering for a future update
- [ ] This is affecting how I use the platform

## Additional context

Screenshots, examples, or anything else useful.
